ense":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://fd1d958ac21bc942877408f38e6c8454c26b4a20d4a9ca9d036fad6889aed0f2","dweb:/ipfs/QmSgtMUHUL6jcVXrJ8cwNcfdhox3XQnXrhWGTK63EF4LJv"]}},"version":1}

params.beneficiary: — the wallet that will receive tokens
params.token: — the ERC20 token address to vest
params.totalAmount: — total tokens to vest (in wei units)
params.vestingDuration: — total seconds of the vesting period

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params.token: — the token address of the schedule

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

claim(address).notice: Beneficiary calls this to claim their vested tokens

createVestingSchedule(address,address,ui.notice: Owner creates a vesting schedule for a beneficiary

getClaimableAmount(address,address).notice: Returns how many tokens are claimable right now

getTotalLocked(address).notice: Returns total tokens locked for a given token

getVestingSchedule(address,address).notice: Returns the full vesting schedule for a beneficiary

pause().notice: Owner can pause the contract in emergencies

revoke(address,address).notice: Owner can cancel a vesting schedule
